title: DonutBroadcast
description: A easy to use broadcast plugin which adds chat broadcast and title Broadcast to your server
body:
DonutBroadcast - High-Performance SMP Alerts

A lightweight and powerful broadcast system inspired by top-tier SMPs like DonutSMP. Built for modern server environments including Paper and Folia.

Key Features:
- Full Folia Support: Uses GlobalRegionScheduler for multi-threaded performance.
- MiniMessage UI: Supports RGB, Gradients, and Rainbow text (no more & codes).
- Chat Mode: Sends clean, padded messages with custom level-up sounds.
- Title Mode: Displays immersive full-screen alerts for urgent news.
- Fully Configurable: Customize all sounds, prefixes, and messages in config.yml.

Commands:
- /broadcast chat <message> : Sends a fancy chat alert.
- /broadcast title <message> : Shows a big title on everyone's screen.
- /broadcast help : Displays the in-game guide.

Permissions:
- matticore.staff.broadcast : Required for sending alerts.

Requirements:
- Server: Paper, Purpur, or Folia (1.20.1 or newer).
- Java: Version 21.

Developed by Mattis
